overview: A cybersecurity-themed IP threat scanner with immersive 3D animations, localStorage-based authentication, and real-time IP reputation checks via AbuseIPDB API with mock fallback.
features: Sign up and login with localStorage-based session (no database)
Protected dashboard accessible only after login
IP address input with AbuseIPDB threat intelligence check
Mock fallback when no API key is configured
SCAM/MALICIOUS (red glow) or SAFE/CLEAN (green glow) result cards
Confidence score, country, ISP, and threat type details
Three.js animated 3D particle network backgrounds on all pages
Dark futuristic glassmorphism UI with neon accents
Fully responsive for desktop and mobile
